referral.min_withdraw_hint: Withdrawals (if offered) unlock only above reference minimum :min; currency/terms follow whatever the billing profile shows.
referral.condition_item_1: One valid referral attribution per referee email;
referral.condition_item_2: No self-use of your own code via duplicate accounts;
referral.condition_item_3: The referee discount attaches to their first qualifying paid checkout;
referral.condition_item_4: Referrer credit fires only once the underlying order validates as completed/paid;
referral.condition_item_5: Coupon cannot be stacked with unrelated promos unless we announce exceptions;
referral.condition_item_6: Credits reference the fulfilled order total our systems record;
referral.condition_item_7: Rates, minimum payouts, or copy may shift with dashboard/email notice;
referral.condition_item_8: Questions go through official support channels only.

landing.hero.subtitle: We change the way you prep for exams. Enjoy :preguntas explained questions, track your progress step by step and see how you're doing the smart way.

landing.hero.mock_opt_d: Build the lipid bilayer of the membrane
landing.features.title: One place to walk into the exam ready
landing.features.subtitle: Tools built around the routine of medical students, with no fluff and no distractions.
landing.features.f1.title: Exams & Mock Tests
landing.features.f1.desc: Thousands of reviewed questions with mock exams that mirror the official exam format.
landing.features.f2.title: Smart Flashcards
landing.features.f2.desc: Adaptive spaced repetition that adjusts every review to your pace.
landing.features.f3.title: My Decks
landing.features.f3.desc: Create your own decks, import your Anki decks (.apkg) and share or discover community decks.
landing.features.f4.title: Transcriber
landing.features.f4.desc: Record, upload audio/video or paste a YouTube link and get the transcript + AI summary.
landing.features.f5.title: AI Tutor
landing.features.f5.desc: 24/7 AI tutor to answer questions, explain concepts and generate personalized quizzes.
landing.features.f6.title: Interactive Atlas
landing.features.f6.desc: Library of slides and anatomy images with a dedicated viewer.
landing.features.f7.title: Challenges & Groups
landing.features.f7.desc: Create challenges with friends and compete in real-time question matches.
landing.features.f8.title: Study Rooms
landing.features.f8.desc: Video rooms to study together, with shared pomodoro and chat.
landing.features.f9.title: Pomodoro & Sessions
landing.features.f9.desc: Built-in timer, session logs and productivity stats.
landing.features.f10.title: Rankings & Achievements
landing.features.f10.desc: Rankings by subject, streak, category and overall, with badges and progress.
landing.features.f11.title: Content Library
landing.features.f11.desc: Summaries, PDFs and curated materials organized by subject and school.
landing.features.f12.title: Dashboard & Reports
landing.features.f12.desc: Advanced stats, detailed history and performance charts.
landing.features.f13.title: Medical Community
landing.features.f13.desc: Connect with thousands of students and share tips and summaries.
landing.features.f14.title: Premium Support
landing.features.f14.desc: Direct channel with the team, bug reports and support video calls.
landing.mascotes.title: Choose your tutor
landing.mascotes.subtitle: An AI companion with its own personality to join you while you study. Pick yours when you create your account.
landing.modalidades.title: Question bank: from CBC to the residency exam
landing.modalidades.subtitle: Pick your school and discover the available subjects.
landing.modalidades.proximamente_desc: Soon you'll be able to practice for the residency exam.
landing.como.title: How it works
landing.como.s1.title: Pick your career
landing.como.s1.desc: Select your school and the subjects you're taking.
landing.como.s2.title: Practice without limits
landing.como.s2.desc: Solve justified questions citing official sources.
landing.como.s3.title: Track your progress
landing.como.s3.desc: Detailed stats by subject, midterm and topic.
landing.planes.title: Pick your plan
landing.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
landing.faq.desc: Everything you need to know about the platform, the content and the available plans.
landing.faq.a1: We cover the main subjects from UBA, UNLP, Barceló and CBC. See the details by picking your school above.
landing.faq.q2: Are the questions up to date and justified?
landing.faq.a2: Yes, every question has a justification citing the official source and is updated periodically.
landing.faq.a3: We have stats by subject, midterm, topic and temporal evolution in your panel.
landing.faq.q4: How do I access the platform?
landing.faq.a4: You buy a plan, create your account and immediately get access to the contracted subjects.
landing.faq.a5: Yes, we offer 5 free questions per subject so you can get to know the system.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions of Use
terms.intro: These Terms and Conditions govern the use of the Banco de Choices platform ("the Platform"), a multiple-choice exam preparation service aimed at health science students. By creating an account, purchasing a plan, or using any feature of the Platform, the user fully accepts the conditions described herein.
terms.section_service_body: Banco de Choices provides access to a question bank organized by school, subject, and course, along with practice exams, performance statistics, and study tools. The content is provided solely for educational and preparation purposes; it does not replace official course materials and does not guarantee any specific result on actual exams.
terms.section_account_body: The user is responsible for keeping their access credentials confidential and for all activity carried out through their account. Sharing access with third parties, reselling content, or using the account for purposes other than personal study is prohibited. Banco de Choices may suspend accounts that violate these conditions.
terms.section_payment_body: Payments are processed through Mercado Pago, in the currency and account selected by the user at checkout (Argentina/ARS or Brazil/BRL). Access to purchased subjects is granted automatically once payment is confirmed by Mercado Pago. Plans have a fixed duration (monthly, semester, or annual) and access is automatically deactivated when the contracted period ends, unless renewed.
terms.section_refund_body: Given the digital and immediate nature of the access granted, no refunds are issued once purchased content has been enabled on the user's account, except in cases of a verified billing error or a technical failure attributable to the Platform. Any claim must be made within 7 days of purchase via the contact email.
terms.section_content_body: All content available on the Platform (questions, explanations, statistics, design, and interface) is the property of Banco de Choices or its licensors and is protected under applicable intellectual property law. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of the content without express authorization is prohibited.
terms.section_privacy_body: Personal data provided by the user (name, email, billing data) is used exclusively to manage the account, process payments, and send service-related communications. No personal data is shared with third parties except as strictly necessary to process payments (Mercado Pago) or comply with legal obligations.
terms.section_liability_body: Banco de Choices does not guarantee uninterrupted availability of the Platform and is not responsible for academic outcomes resulting from use of the service. Content is reviewed and updated periodically, but may occasionally contain errors, which will be corrected once identified.
terms.section_changes_body: Banco de Choices may update these Terms and Conditions at any time to reflect changes in the service or in applicable law. Changes take effect once published on this same page.
terms.section_contact_body: For questions, complaints, or requests related to these Terms and Conditions, write to bancodechoices@gmail.com.
